38#define __SEXP_H__
39
40#include <stddef.h>

129/*==============*/
130/* ENUMERATIONS */
131/*==============*/
132
139typedef enum {
144 SEXP_VALUE,
145
150 SEXP_LIST
151} elt_t;
152
170typedef enum {
174 SEXP_BASIC,
175
180 SEXP_SQUOTE,
181
186 SEXP_DQUOTE,
187
192 SEXP_BINARY
193} atom_t;
194
195/*============*/
196/* STRUCTURES */
197/*============*/
198
227typedef struct elt {
239 elt_t ty;
240
246 char *val;
247
251 size_t val_allocated;
252
256 size_t val_used;
257
262 struct elt *list;
263
269 struct elt *next;
270
280 atom_t aty;
281
291 char *bindata;
292
296 size_t binlength;
297} sexp_t;
298
303typedef enum {
307 PARSER_NORMAL,
308
313 PARSER_INLINE_BINARY,
314
324 PARSER_EVENTS_ONLY
325} parsermode_t;
326
338typedef struct parser_event_handlers {
343 void (* start_sexpr)();
344
349 void (* end_sexpr)();
350
357 void (* characters)(const char *data, size_t len, atom_t aty);
358
365 void (* binary)(const char *data, size_t len);
366} parser_event_handlers_t;
367
395typedef struct pcont {
399 faststack_t *stack;
400
408 sexp_t *last_sexp;
409
413 char *val;
414
418 size_t val_allocated;
419
423 size_t val_used;
424
429 char *vcur;
430
437 char *lastPos;
438
444 char *sbuffer;
445
450 unsigned int depth;
451
456 unsigned int qdepth;
457
463 unsigned int state;
464
470 unsigned int esc;
471
476 unsigned int squoted;
477
483 sexp_errcode_t error;
484
498 parsermode_t mode;
499
500 /* -----------------------------------------------------------------
501 * These fields below are related to dealing with INLINE_BINARY mode
502 * ----------------------------------------------------------------- */
503
509 size_t binexpected;
510
514 size_t binread;
515
519 char *bindata;
520
528 parser_event_handlers_t *event_handlers;
529} pcont_t;
530
539typedef struct sexp_iowrap {
543 pcont_t *cc;
544
549 int fd;
550
554 char buf[BUFSIZ];
555
560 size_t cnt;
561} sexp_iowrap_t;
562
563/*========*/
564/* GLOBAL */
565/*========*/
566
571extern sexp_errcode_t sexp_errno;
572
573/*===========*/
574/* FUNCTIONS */
575/*===========*/
576
577/* this is for C++ users */
578#ifdef __cplusplus
579extern "C" {
580#endif
610 sexp_errcode_t set_parser_buffer_params(size_t ss, size_t gs);
611
620 sexp_t *sexp_t_allocate(void);
621
627 void sexp_t_deallocate(sexp_t *s);
628
637 void sexp_cleanup(void);
638
649 int print_sexp(char *loc, size_t size, const sexp_t *e);
650
660 int print_sexp_cstr(CSTRING **s, const sexp_t *e, size_t ss);
661
665 sexp_t *new_sexp_list(sexp_t *l);
666
675 sexp_t *new_sexp_binary_atom(char *data, size_t binlength);
676
687 sexp_t *new_sexp_atom(const char *buf, size_t bs, atom_t aty);
688
692 pcont_t *init_continuation(char *str);
693
698 void destroy_continuation (pcont_t * pc);
699
706 sexp_iowrap_t *init_iowrap(int fd);
707
714 void destroy_iowrap(sexp_iowrap_t *iow);
715
727 sexp_t *read_one_sexp(sexp_iowrap_t *iow);
728
733 sexp_t *parse_sexp(char *s, size_t len);
734
740 sexp_t *iparse_sexp(char *s, size_t len, pcont_t *cc);
741
747 pcont_t *cparse_sexp(char *s, size_t len, pcont_t *pc);
748
760 void destroy_sexp(sexp_t *s);
761
765 void reset_sexp_errno();
766
775 void print_pcont(pcont_t * pc, char * buf, size_t buflen);
776
777 /* this is for C++ users */
778#ifdef __cplusplus
779}
780#endif
